analysis.summary: An electrifying fusion of 90s-inspired Dirty South R&B and reggaeton, 'International Heat' is a sultry, seductive journey through a night of passion and temptation, set against the backdrop of a vibrant Ho Chi Minh City club scene.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A dimly lit club with glowing neon lights reflecting off the bodies of couples entwined in a slow, intimate dance.
A multicultural crowd under a shimmering ceiling, dancing to a fusion of global rhythms with the scent of incense and sweat in the air.
A red-hot spotlight casting long shadows over a packed dance floor, where the air is thick with desire and the bass is felt in the bones.
A pulsating beat that vibrates through the floor, drawing people into a collective, hypnotic movement that feels unstoppable.
A velvet curtain drawn back to reveal a secret world of decadence, where every glance and touch is laced with forbidden allure.
A close-up of two people locked in a slow, sultry embrace, their eyes reflecting the fire of unspoken longing and unrelenting passion.
A spotlight on a confident woman, her silhouette outlined in gold, as the crowd cheers and claps in admiration of her magnetic presence.
A powerful figure standing on a stage, surrounded by swirling lights, commanding the room with a gaze that promises both danger and liberation.
A deep, rumbling bass that shakes the very foundation of the club, vibrating through the floor and into the core of every dancer.
